item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday final CeleryDump of the year for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends.. thanks for all the comments and everything else this year
NEW YORK CITY??!!??
maybe in the aforementioned nyc
gonna pass on this one looks like heartburn city
godspeed snooty
now we play the waiting game
one other pop tart related image in this dump.. see if you can spot it!
excellent selection
wait what
(holding wet mop over the fries)
yep! you got it
who could forget the famous golf scene
pigeon nest with needles obviously
mmm hmm
as is tradition
better do some coke to speed up my heart a smidge
wanted this old favorite to be last one of the year
that's my time.. HAVE A GREAT NEW YEARS EVE GANG!! back on 1st or 2nd
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Phryne was a common nickname for 'hetaria' (prostitutes) meaning 'toad'
item.description: Mnesarete was believed to be her real name. She's got a true rags to riches story, having grown up very poor but becoming one of the wealthiest women in Greece during her time ~350bc. She even offered to pay to rebuild the walls of Thebes after Alexander the Great trashed them, on the condition that they carve her name into the wall. They denied her offer. Her most famous moment happened when she was charged with impiety and was this offensive toward the gods. Her lawyer, Hypereides, decided to go big or go home. He ripped open her dress in front of the judges, showing off her body, and argued that someone that beautiful couldn’t possibly be offensive to the gods. The judges bought it. They let her go, and she went down in history. Now, I'm not a historian, so if I got any of this wrong, feel free to correct me as you should. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: As an Illinois native and resident, if we are going to change our boring flag then this looks good.
item.description: FP update: When the image says born and raised in Illinois, it means the submitter of the image was born and raised in Illinois. It is not referring to Abraham Lincoln.

item.title: People should be allowed to be horny.
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1228 (pangaea railway)
item.description:
Bread. Let's get this sexy, sexy bread.
This was me hard-core all day yesterday. My poor gaming group. I could not focus enough to get us moving through the city. We gave up and played a version of Cards against humanity instead.
Accurate.
Böops. My name is Böops böops.
What's that one cycle again? Oh, right. The carbon cycle.
I'd do a lot of things if I had the cash and time.
Accurate.
I am fascinated by economics, especially trade routes, up until the Renaissance period where it starts to get boring, and Profit and Capital become hungry gods with open mouths and bottomless maws for the rich to sacrifice to.
Mood.
Not related to this image at all, but a cool science thing: a whole new class of potential lifeforms known as Obelisks have been found everywhere, including in poop.: https://www.sciencealert.com/obelisks-entirely-new-class-of-life-has-been-found-in-the-human-digestive-system
Ancient Aliens is just another form of Colonialism believing that non-white people can't do anything. If you believe that shit, fuck you, pull your head out of your ass, and look at the actual archaeology. These people did amazing, splendid, wonderful things with their own hands. I almost started a fight with the waiter on mom's birthday last week who was this sort of person and said "we don't know how the pyramids were built" and "the Smithsonian is hiding things in the Grand Canyon." I didn't want to cause a scene and ruin what might well be the last birthday dinner we ever get to have. I mean, for the pyramids, we literally have the fucking receipts showing how the workers were paid. Ffs. Anyway, I'm going to shut up now about this before I make myself angry.
Accurate.
Would have been amazing.
Judas Iscariot is one of the earliest examples of class traitors in the historical record, change my mind. Even if you don't believe Jesus was also God, he was a peasant prophet from Palestine who was poor as dirt and started a movement to try and improve the lives of his fellow people, and Judas betrayed him to the cops (Romans and their erstwhile lackies in the colonized population) for the price of an average slave. Yup. Average price of a slave: 40 denarii, the equivalent roughly to a month's wages. And even if you don't believe Jesus was even *real*, then you still have this *example* of class warfare in literature which is being read by and to people--which tells us that this sort of thing was happening at the time.
The more I read, the more I think that the state--as it is now--should be destroyed. Scarcity is artificial. We could have a star trek world here, now, minus the space travel, but those greedy sons of bitches....
This seems like some sort of trap.
Mood.
Classic columbusing.
Maaaaaatrix.
I'm so tired.
Maiasaura, I think.
Why not both?
I kinda want to see if I can make a Mambo number 0, in Proto-Indo-European.
At least you got off that Halifax pier for once.
Oh, those willy crafty dukes of Epirus.
Pippin (and Alvin tax)! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin." (whispered while preening my eyelashes)
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Trans Girl Tuesday: Christmas
item.description:
CatKitty https://www.instagram.com/cosplaycatkitty/ Christmas has come and gone but I found lots of fun Christmas themed pictures.
Pierbi (& Starryfawnn) https://www.instagram.com/p1erbi/ (NSFW) If I'm being honest I considered posting the "Blahaj Trend" because personally I find it cute and wholesome, but I realize many don't feel the same way. Pierbi's is on her Instagram, one reason it's marked NSFW...
Morgana Ignis https://www.instagram.com/morganaignis/
Rhea https://www.instagram.com/its_peachybunnn/
Erin https://www.instagram.com/femboy_fishing/ (She keeps the FemboyFishing name for brand reasons, as she founded Femboy Fishing LLC a couple years ago)

item.title: Board of Supervisors lying to public about lost footage.
item.description: I believe our county board of supervisors are lying to us. Trying to take control of the library so that they can censor LGBTQ+ books, and any they don't deem in line with their conservative fake christian vision of our county. Granicus, a hosting company for digital records, was blamed by the board of supervisors. However, We were all told the lost footage, highlighting some of the most important speakers for library autonomy, was lost by them and deemed unrecoverable. However, the existence of this footage indicates that the Board of Supervisors were lying to us and are trying to censor reality. And more importantly, that we cannot trust the rest of what they said about constituents, who could not be bothered to show up at the meeting, and could not be named, were 'secretly in favor' of these christofascist's agenda of taking steps towards removing books they don't deem in line with their pseudo christian values. They just hate trans and gay people for no good reason, and think that removing books stops them from existing. More than 100 people showed up in favor of keeping the library independent. A tremendous showing for our small community. Less than 15 showed up try to back the board of supervisors, who I imagine are the only 15 people the could beg to show up. Youtube link: (its pretty dry stuff, but very important.) https://youtu.be/ZqtcWqgLOqo?si=hPKKpkWvme0S1cBL
item.dc:creator: ChancesAreGreat

item.title: I support this
item.description: Mark Cuban: "Price controls always sound good. The question becomes: "who agrees to take less money". If the CC comps don't say they are willing to make less money on interest, they will make it up in 2 ways : Inventing other fees and charges Cancelling/not approving the cards of anyone without good credit"

item.title: "We're gonna be in the Hudson" Captain Sully
item.description: On January 15, 2009, the Airbus A320 serving the flight struck a flock of birds shortly after takeoff from LaGuardia, losing all engine power. Given their position in relation to the available airports and their low altitude, pilots Chesley "Sully" Sullenberger and Jeffrey Skiles decided to glide the plane to ditching on the Hudson River near Midtown Manhattan. All 155 people on board were rescued by nearby boats. There were no fatalities, although 100 people were injured, 5 of them seriously. The time from the bird strike to the ditching was less than four minutes. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/US_Airways_Flight_1549 #interesting #unmuted
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants
